news.title: Suraj Estate Developers acquires land for ₹18 crore in Dadar West, Mumbai
news.para: Suraj Estate Developers has acquired a land parcel in Mumbai’s Dadar West for a total consideration of ₹18 crore, including cash and area sharing. The company plans to redevelop the plot with an estimated gross development value of around ₹100 crore.

news.title: A-khata maze: High costs, missing paperwork stall approvals in Bengaluru
news.para: Bengaluru's A-khata conversion process is struggling, with only 818 properties granted the status in six months.  Deep structural issues, including documentation gaps and significant financial burdens for property owners, are hindering progress.  Despite over 8 lakh B-khata properties, only a fraction have applied, with most applications still pending due to these challenges.

news.title: Building malls now needs deeper pockets as construction costs rose 13.9%
news.para: Construction costs for malls have surged by a record 13.9% over two years, driven by enhanced designs and MEP expenses. Luxury and mid-market housing also saw significant cost increases due to improved amenities. Developers are now prioritizing efficiency and planning amidst rising development activity and input volatility.

news.title: YEIDA extends deadline for FinTech hub application
news.para: The Yamuna Expressway Industrial Development Authority (YEIDA) has extended the application deadline for its 500-acre FinTech hub to April 29. This revision aims to attract more global investors and industry stakeholders attending the upcoming Money Alpha 360° financial summit. The hub will accommodate core financial services, IT, and digital operations, fostering innovation in digital banking and electronic payments.

news.title: Delhi LG visits Swabhiman Apartments, orders quick fix to residents’ grievances
news.para: Lieutenant Governor Taranjit Singh Sandhu visited Swabhiman Apartments to gather feedback from residents on living conditions and civic amenities. He directed concerned departments to prioritize addressing issues like seepage, garbage management, and lift malfunctions. The visit highlighted the project's aim to provide dignified housing under the "Jahan Jhuggi, Wahin Makan" initiative.

news.title: Bangalore development body to pay ₹56 lakh interest for delay in Kempegowda Layout amenities
news.para: Karnataka RERA has ordered the Bangalore Development Authority (BDA) to pay Rs 56 lakh in interest to a complainant for delays in providing basic amenities at Nadaprabhu Kempegowda Layout. The authority ruled BDA is a 'promoter' liable for deficiencies, emphasizing that possession without infrastructure is insufficient. This ruling follows BDA's NPKL project being previously flagged as lapsed.

news.title: India plans special NCLT bench for cross-border insolvency cases to speed up resolutions
news.para: India plans to set up a special NCLT bench with trained members to handle cross-border insolvency cases once new rules under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code are notified. The move, based on a modified UN model law, aims to speed up resolution and improve coordination with foreign courts.

news.title: Delhi court sends ex-Reliance Group executives to five days' ED custody
news.para: A Delhi court has sent two former Reliance Anil Ambani Group executives to ED custody. Amitabh Jhunjhunwala and Amit Bapna are accused in a bank loan fraud and money laundering case. The Enforcement Directorate alleges loan funds were siphoned to shell companies controlled by the group. Digital evidence reportedly crystallizes their role in diverting crores of rupees.

news.title: KingSett Capital, Choice Properties to acquire First Capital in $6.85 billion deal
news.para: Choice Properties and KingSett Capital are joining forces to acquire First Capital REIT in a groundbreaking deal worth C$9.4 billion. Choice is set to take leadership of First Capital's grocery-anchored retail properties, whereas KingSett will handle the other assets in the portfolio.

news.title: PropShare Celestia's ₹244-crore IPO subscribed 1.33 times
news.para: On Thursday, PropShare Celestia's IPO wrapped up, successfully attracting 1.33 times the subscription rate. This marks the third offering from Property Share Investment Trust focusing on Small and Medium Real Estate Investment Trusts. With its sights set on purchasing commercial properties in Ahmedabad, the initiative garnered an impressive demand of Rs 324 crore.

news.title: Housing supply rises 10% year-on-year, prices up 14% across major cities in Q1 2026: Report
news.para: India’s residential market saw a 10.1% year-on-year increase in supply and a 14.1% rise in property prices in Q1 2026, even as demand moderated sequentially. The shift towards premium housing and larger homes continued, with 2BHK and 3BHK units accounting for the bulk of demand.

news.title: Lucknow Police attaches real-estate-fraud syndicate's assets worth ₹5.78 crore
news.para: Lucknow Police seized assets exceeding Rs 5.78 crore in a major real-estate fraud crackdown. The operation targeted an organized syndicate selling non-existent or disputed land.  The gang specifically preyed on armed forces personnel.  This action under the Gangsters Act aims to curb organized crime and protect citizens. Further seizures are anticipated as investigations continue.

news.title: Illegal colonies pollute Ganga; Haridwar civic body writes to irrigation department
news.para: In localities such as Rajiv Nagar Basti and Sonia Basti, household waste is being discharged into the Ganga, while untreated sewage and wastewater from homes are also flowing directly into the river, significantly increasing pollution levels.

news.title: Sowparnika Projects eyes ₹500 crore fundraise to double revenue
news.para: Sowparnika Projects is in advanced talks to raise Rs 500 crore for expansion, aiming to develop 5.5 million sq ft across South India over the next two years. The real estate firm targets doubling its turnover to Rs 1,500 crore by FY2026-27, with a focus on the mid and upper-mid residential market.

news.title: Chandigarh industrial converted plot owners seek FAR parity
news.para: Converted commercial plot owners in Chandigarh are urging the administration for increased floor area ratio and revised height restrictions.  They highlight substantial financial contributions made during conversion.  The association seeks a clear policy to differentiate commercial and industrial plots.  These changes aim to improve project viability and protect investments.

news.title: Pimpri Chinchwad residents demand action against builders over broken water supply promises
news.para: Housing societies in Pimpri Chinchwad are demanding action against developers who failed to provide water, despite written promises. Residents have spent lakhs on private tankers since 2019. The civic body is compiling a list of defaulting builders, who face legal action and denial of future permissions. Regular supply awaits the Bhama Askhed pipeline completion.

news.title: The Hosteller raises ₹150 crore led by PROMAFT Partners in series B funding
news.para: The Hosteller has raised ₹150 crore in a Series B funding round led by PROMAFT Partners and V3 Ventures, with participation from ITI Growth Opportunities Fund, Merisis Wealth Trust and family offices. The company said the round is the largest institutional fundraise by a backpacker hostel chain in India.

news.title: Lucknow civic body approves major development projects; new township in Amausi included
news.para: Lucknow Municipal Corporation approved significant development proposals, including a township on 21.6 acres in Amausi and handing over land for planned development in Jiyamau. A Rs 1.10 crore ward development fund for each of the 110 wards was also sanctioned for local infrastructure improvements.
